violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as chicken) in two door refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. -PIC moved eggs to bottom shelf and placed chicken on top shelf during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC washed, rinsed and sanitized slicer during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. PIC removed utensils and stagnant to 3-bay sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

The grease/oil trap outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025
The floor tiles in the bar area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025

The areas under the cook-line and hood vents over stove in the kitchen has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
The wall panel in the walk-in cooler and wall panel in the prep area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025
No person certified in food safety were present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. The handout for cleaning up vomit/diarrhea provided to establishment at the time of this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

An open employees' beverage container was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. -Staff moved open beverage to designated area during time of this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

Employee observed from coming from outside without changing gloves and washing hands. -Proper glove change procedures reviewed and when to wash hands reviewed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

Raw animal foods such as shrimp were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cooked shrimp) in the two-door refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. -PIC moved raw shrimp to bottom shelve underneath cooked shrimp. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
Plumbing underneath sink located in the cookline area was not in good repair. Water observed leaking into a container. Piping shall be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

The grease/oil trap outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
The floor tiles in the bar area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The floors and walls in walk-in cooler and kitchen. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

The grease trap outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Per PIC, company has been contacted to move grease trap during next visit. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023
Cooked chicken was observed stored in raw chicken boxes. Chicken was disposed of. Proper food storage was reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicing cleaning guide printed for PIC. Slicer to not be used until taken apart and wash, rinsed, and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023

Sweet and sour sauce which was previously cooked was observed held at 80 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, sauce recently was cooked. Sauce was reheated. Proper hot holding reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023

Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Knives were observed stored in between prep unit and table. Knife was taken to dish washer to be sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation bio-film. Ice machine to be turned off emptied and washed, rinsed, and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023

The grease trap outside is located on dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2023
